news.title_en: Solana DeFi TVL Rises 12% This Week
news.summary_zh: 据DeFiLlama数据，Solana生态总锁仓量本周上涨12%，主要受新晋去中心化交易所交易量增长推动。
news.summary_en: Solana's total DeFi TVL increased 12% this week, driven by rising trading volume from new DEXs, according to DeFiLlama.

news.title_zh: Cardano公布2026年Plutus V4升级路线图
news.title_en: Cardano Reveals 2026 Plutus V4 Upgrade Roadmap
news.summary_zh: IOG团队发布Plutus V4技术路线图，预计2026年Q3上线主网，将提升智能合约表达能力并降低手续费。
news.summary_en: IOG released the Plutus V4 technical roadmap, targeting mainnet launch in Q3 2026. It aims to enhance smart contract expressiveness and reduce transaction fees.

news.title_en: Chainlink CCIP Adds Support for 5 Major Blockchains
news.summary_zh: Chainlink跨链互操作协议CCIP新增支持Avalanche、Polygon zkEVM、Base、Arbitrum和Optimism，扩展多链生态互操作性。
news.summary_en: Chainlink CCIP now supports Avalanche, Polygon zkEVM, Base, Arbitrum, and Optimism, enhancing cross-chain interoperability across major networks.

news.title_zh: 狗狗币拟引入ZK-Rollup扩容方案
news.title_en: Dogecoin Proposes ZK-Rollup Layer2 Scaling Solution
news.summary_zh: Dogecoin基金会发布草案，研究基于ZK-Rollup的Layer2扩容，旨在降低小额转账手续费。
news.summary_en: Dogecoin Foundation releases draft exploring ZK-Rollup-based Layer2 scaling to reduce microtransaction fees.
